name: Total Stock Summary Rpt
query:
SELECT
    b.warehouse AS "Warehouse:Data:120",
    i.item_code AS "Item Code:100",
    i.description AS "Description:Data:120",
    i.item_group AS "Item Group:Data:120",
    i.stock_uom AS "UOM:Data:100",
    i.customer_master AS "Customer Master:Data:120",
    i.sales_person_master AS "Sales Person Master:Data:120",
    b.actual_qty AS "Current Qty:Float:100",
    b.reserved_stock AS "Reserved Qty:Float:100",
    (b.actual_qty - b.reserved_stock) AS "UnAllocated Qty:Float:100",
    CASE 
    WHEN (
        IFNULL(b.actual_qty, 0)
        - IFNULL(so.pending_so_qty, 0)
    ) < 0 
    THEN  (
        IFNULL(b.actual_qty, 0)
        - IFNULL(so.pending_so_qty, 0)
    )
    Else 0
END AS "Projected Qty:Float:100",
    IFNULL(asn.asn_qty,0) AS "ASN Qty:Float:100",
    IFNULL(po_pending.po_pending_qty,0) AS "PO Pending Qty:Float:100",
    (
        SELECT MAX(pi.posting_date)
        FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
        INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii 
            ON pii.parent = pi.name
        WHERE pii.item_code = i.item_code
          AND pi.docstatus = 1
          AND pi.is_return = 0
          AND pi.is_subcontracted = 0
    ) AS "Last Purchase Date:Date",
    wd.type AS "Type:Data:80",
    CASE WHEN wd.to_be_check = 1 THEN '☑️' ELSE '⬜️' END AS "To Be Check:Data:50",
    wd.rack AS "Rack:Data:80",
    wd.bin AS "Bin:Data:80",
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M0",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M1",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M2",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M3",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M4",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M5",

    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(si.posting_date) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) 
         AND MONTH(si.posting_date) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)) 
         AND b.warehouse = si.set_warehouse 
    THEN sii.qty ELSE 0 END) AS "M6"

FROM `tabBin` b

INNER JOIN `tabItem` i 
    ON b.item_code = i.item_code

INNER JOIN `tabWarehouse` w 
    ON w.name = b.warehouse

LEFT JOIN `tabWarehouse Details` wd 
    ON wd.parent = i.item_code 
   AND wd.warehouse = b.warehouse
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        item_code, warehouse,
        SUM(qty - delivered_qty) AS pending_so_qty
    FROM `tabSales Order Item`
    WHERE docstatus = 1
    GROUP BY item_code
) so ON so.item_code = b.item_code and so.warehouse = b.warehouse

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        pod.item_code,
        pod.warehouse,
        SUM(pod.qty) AS asn_qty
    FROM `tabPurchase Receipt` po
    INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Receipt Item` pod 
        ON pod.parent = po.name
    WHERE po.docstatus = 0 and po.workflow_state = 'In Transit'
    GROUP BY pod.item_code, pod.warehouse
) asn 
ON asn.item_code = b.item_code 
AND asn.warehouse = b.warehouse

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        poi.item_code,
        poi.warehouse,
        SUM(poi.qty - poi.received_qty) AS po_pending_qty
    FROM `tabPurchase Order` po
    INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` poi 
        ON poi.parent = po.name
    WHERE po.docstatus = 1
      AND po.status NOT IN ('Cancelled','Closed')
    GROUP BY poi.item_code, poi.warehouse
) po_pending
ON po_pending.item_code = b.item_code
AND po_pending.warehouse = b.warehouse

LEFT JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii 
    ON sii.item_code = b.item_code

LEFT JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si 
    ON si.name = sii.parent 
   AND si.docstatus = 1
   AND si.posting_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)

WHERE
(
    b.actual_qty > 0
OR (
        IFNULL(b.actual_qty, 0)
        - IFNULL(so.pending_so_qty, 0)
    ) < 0 
    OR IFNULL(asn.asn_qty,0) > 0
    OR IFNULL(po_pending.po_pending_qty,0) > 0
)

GROUP BY
    b.warehouse, 
    i.item_code, 
    wd.type, 
    wd.rack, 
    wd.bin

ORDER BY
    i.item_code;
